title: Alterna
description: Transforming Minecraft one phase at a time
body: **Alterna** is a mod that aims to transform the game bit by bit, one "phase" at a time. Each phase will have many versions released to add onto the theme, almost like this mod's version of game drops. Please check the changelogs for more information, they're very detailed! You can also join the Discord server to keep up with news or share feedback. ### Dev Team lycanlucy ### Art Team VitreousGlassy | ianaduarte | cw.png | OyamaCallista | Decadenza
